annotation.text: Final is not a terminal state. An item in final  can’t be iterated or edited, but it can be reinducted into a previous stage for editing or iteration. An item in final *can* be approved, in which case it is promoted to published (for clarity, we could have a distinct verb, “publish”, that promoted final items to published, bit for consistency, we should just use “approve”, since that’s the verb used for the same
